# v91 — σ-Quantum

Canonical directory: [`src/v91/`](../../src/v91/).

## Abstract

Covers: init determinism, Pauli-X/Z/H/CNOT correctness, Hadamard
self-inverse, uniform superposition after full Hadamard layer,
Grover amplification toward marked state for all 16 markers,
probability conservation under the full gate set, and the 31-bit
compose truth table.

## Source

- `src/v91/creation_os_v91.c`
- `src/v91/quantum.c`
- `src/v91/quantum.h`

## Self-test

```bash
make check-v91
```

## Relation to the σ-stack

Layer membership (cf. `docs/AGI_ARCHITECTURE.md`):

- Layer 3 (σ-Governance) — σ-Hierarchical: EMA convergence, schema compose, free-energy accumulation, proof and release bundle.

## Source-header excerpt

```c
/* SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later
 *
 * Creation OS v91 — σ-Quantum self-test driver.
 *
 * Covers: init determinism, Pauli-X/Z/H/CNOT correctness, Hadamard
 * self-inverse, uniform superposition after full Hadamard layer,
 * Grover amplification toward marked state for all 16 markers,
 * probability conservation under the full gate set, and the 31-bit
 * compose truth table.
 */

#include "quantum.h"

#include <stdint.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>

static uint32_t pass_count = 0;
static uint32_t fail_count = 0;

#define CHECK(cond) do {                                                 \
    if (cond) { ++pass_count; }                                          \
    else {                                                               \
        ++fail_count;                                                    \
        if (fail_count <= 10u)                                           \
            printf("FAIL %s:%d: %s\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, #cond);       \
    }                                                                    \
} while (0)

static uint64_t xs(uint64_t *s)
{
    uint64_t x = *s; x ^= x << 13; x ^= x >> 7; x ^= x << 17; *s = x;
    return x;
}

```
